parsed.availability_comment: Available for IPL 2026 on current evidence; prior injury appears resolved.
parsed.availability_note: Ruled out of IPL 2025 with a toe injury, but retained by SRH for 2026 and included in England's early-2026 white-ball plans; no fresh adverse report found before March 23, 2026.
parsed.followup_reason: Availability looks fine, but actual XI status remains unclear due to heavy overseas competition and no confirmed opening-match lineup yet.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Overseas berth is matchup-dependent rather than locked.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Strong overseas-slot pressure at SRH, with Cummins, Head and Klaasen more established; Carse competes with Livingstone, Kamindu Mendis, Eshan Malinga and Jack Edwards for remaining flexibility.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: Named in SRH's 2026 squad, but not clearly ahead of Cummins, Head, Klaasen and other overseas balance options.

You are refining one player's non-stats fields after an initial team-level pass.
Use web search. Prefer official IPL / franchise / BCCI sources, then reputable cricket reporting.

Rules:
- Return JSON only.
- Keep the same schema as the team-level player object.
- Resolve ambiguity where possible using recent evidence.
- Keep comments short and audit-friendly.
- If evidence remains conflicting, say so explicitly and keep needs_player_followup=true.
- Every source URL array must contain at least one URL.

Refine this single-player non-stats assessment and return the structured JSON.
